sourceMovie.title: Chaos Walking
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Chaos Walking (2021) as a fantasy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The fantasy and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Vesper
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Chaos Walking clicked for you, Vesper (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Divergent
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Chaos Walking clicked for you, Divergent (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Chaos Walking?
faq.answer: Try Vesper, Divergent, 2001: A Space Odyssey—each shares DNA with Chaos Walking while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Chaos Walking?
faq.answer: Chaos Walking (2021) is best described as Fantasy, Science Fiction, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Chaos Walking worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this fantasy lane.
